widgets: RunFlowWidget (pratibimba.acr.run-tree) — hosts run tree, tool stream, diagnostics, abort/retry/continue, evidence deposition, review decision controls

human_gate_enforcement.ui_side: enforceHumanGate() called BEFORE bridge.invokeCapability for any approve/reject/revise on a humanRequired candidate; defer is always allowed; agentic actors are blocked with humanGateBlocks entry

coverage: human-gate (3): non-human-required passes all decisions+actors; human-required+agent blocks approve/reject/revise + allows defer; human-required+human passes all
evidence-envelope (5): default null fields; missingEvidenceFields lists all required; fully populated reports no missing; partial reports only missing; privacy class defaults+override

run-flow (6): capability parity asserts equal sets; flags missing-from-UI; flags missing-from-gateway; real capability-matrix.json yields >=5 dispatch tools; parity vs. shadow gateway flags the dropped tool; ACR widget IDs use pratibimba.acr.* namespace

substrate_truth_gate.result: 6/6 passing (incl. review_inbox suite 4/4 with human-gate enforcement test)

three_way_parity_verified.matrix: Body/S/S4/plugins/pleroma/capability-matrix.json parsed by parseCapabilityMatrix(); dispatch_tools surfaced via dispatchToolNames()
three_way_parity_verified.ui: AgenticControlRoomWidget renders capability tree from the matrix; RunFlowWidget routes via the same dispatch_tools
three_way_parity_verified.gateway: s4'.mediation.route + s5'.review.submit are dispatched through KERNEL_BRIDGE_API.invokeCapability — capability allow-list ['invokeGatewayRpc'] enforces it; gateway-side ownership in Body/S/S3/gateway/src/dispatch.rs:254-256 routes 's4'.vak.evaluate'|'s4'.orchestrate'|'s4'.mediation.route' to S5EpiiAgent

findings_for_other_threads: The gateway must expose `s4'.mediation.capabilities.list` (or equivalent) for the IDE Shell to assert the matrix↔gateway bijection automatically at runtime. Currently the matrix is the source-of-truth on both sides; parity is asserted in unit tests via dispatchToolNames(matrix). Recommend Track 09/Track 11 add a gateway capability-list method so the parity becomes live, not just spec-time.

The runtime service ACR_RUNTIME_SERVICE is bound as a singleton inside the agentic-control-room frontend module. The ide-shell-m0-m5 chrome's AgenticControlRoomWidget (T4) and this extension's RunFlowWidget (T8) share state because both inject from the same Theia DI container — confirmed by the smoke-build chunk presence of both extensions.

Human-gate parity is now testable end-to-end: cargo test (gateway side) + node --test (UI side) both refuse agent transitions on humanRequired candidates. T9 should add an integration test that drives both sides in one process to assert the rejection symmetry on a single candidate.
